nasb.text: “You shall make a table of acacia wood, two cubits long and one cubit wide and one and a half cubits high.

esv.text: “You shall make a table of acacia wood. Two cubits shall be its length, a cubit its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.

cnv.text: “你要用皂莢木做一張桌子，長八十八公分，寬四十四公分，高六十六公分。

ccb.text: “要用皂荚木造一张桌子，长八十八厘米，宽四十四厘米，高六十六厘米。
